success.description: The target suffers 1 stress as the lines between real and unreal blur
The target suffers stress equal to the target's stance depth
As above, and the target gains 1 temporary insanity with the Supernatural or Chaos trait

boon.description: The target must make an Average (2d) Resilience check to resist corruption

bane.description: The target may remove 1 recharge token from any of his currently recharging cards

sigmarsComet.description: Remove 1 non-Basic action card from the target's action deck. He can't use that action until the end of the encounter, so badly has his grasp on reality faltered

reckless.name: Unravel Reality
reckless.requirements:
Used By: Coloured Fiends, Bobo
Target within close range

success.description: The target suffers stress equal to the target's stance depth
As above, and the target suffers 1 temporary insanity with the Supernatural or Chaos trait

boon.description: The target must make a Hard (3d) Resilience check to avoid gaining corruption

bane.description: The target may remove 1 recharge token from any of his currently recharging cards
The fiend loses 1 die from its Cunning budget

chaosStar.description: The fiend loses 1 die from its Cunning budget
